scripts.ml:train: python ml/train_disease_model.py --data-roots ml/datasets/plantdisease ml/datasets/rice-leaf-diseases ml/datasets/new-plant-diseases --output-dir ml/artifacts
scripts.ml:predict: python ml/predict_disease.py --model ml/artifacts/model.keras --labels ml/artifacts/labels.json --image ml/sample.jpg --solutions ml/disease_solutions.json
